name: Serpent Potion body butter
description: A rich, indulgent body butter inspired by mystical serpent potions, deeply nourishing skin with a dark, magical, and spiced scent blend.
archive_note: A Halloween seasonal Kitchen exclusive, part of the 2025 autumnal spellcasting-themed range.
nostalgia_angle: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive body butter that fans covet for its evocative, potion-inspired name and rich autumnal scent.
throwback_reference: Inspired by alchemical and folk magic traditions of serpent-based potions, fitting within Lush's Halloween spellcasting narrative for 2025.
